task.title: Task error reporting and handling
task.shortdesc: Use the Remote Error List to find and correct syntax check and build errors.

step.cmd: In the editor, right-click and select Syntax check.
step.stepresult: If the compilation fails, the error message is displayed, along with an indication of the line number in error in the source code.
The cursor is placed in the editor view at the line that contains the error.

step.cmd: Make the correction and press CTRL+S to save the file.

step.stepresult: If you fixed the problem, the error message is removed from the Remote Error List.

step.cmd: From the view, right-click the project and select Rebuild Project.
step.stepresult: If the build fails, error messages are shown in the Remote Error List.

step.cmd: Click OK to save your changes.

step.stepresult: If you fixed the problem, the error message is removed from the Remote Error List.
